content-p1.content: In 2023, we set a science-based target to reduce Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions by 50% before the end of this decade. Eighteen months in, we have already cut operational carbon by 32% through facility electrification and renewable energy procurement.

content-p2.content: Our supply chain accounts for 78% of total emissions. We partnered with 140 tier-one suppliers to transition to low-carbon manufacturing processes, and we now require all new vendors to disclose emissions data before onboarding.

content-p3.content: For residual emissions we cannot yet eliminate, we invest in verified carbon removal projects including direct air capture in Iceland and reforestation across 12,000 hectares in the Pacific Northwest.

content-image.alt: Aerial view of reforestation project in the Pacific Northwest
